name: Mexican Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
2. In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, half and half, oregano, salt, pepper, butter or margarine, and green chiles until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into the preheated skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until set but still slightly runny on top.
4. Fold one-third of the mixture to the side of the pan.
5. Add the sour cream on top of the omelet and gently fold the other two-thirds of the mixture over.
6. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the eggs are fully set.
7. Slide the omelet onto a plate and serve immediately.
